mapper.select: SELECT category_no AS categoryNo, name FROM category_space ORDER BY category_no

SELECT 'TestSpace' AS title, '서울 강남' AS region, '8' AS capacity, '120000' AS price FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'TestSpace' AS title, '서울 강남' AS region, '8' AS capacity, '120000' AS price FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'TestSpace' AS title, '서울 강남' AS region, '8' AS capacity, '120000' AS price FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'TestSpace' AS title, '서울 강남' AS region, '8' AS capacity, '120000' AS price FROM dual

SELECT space_no AS num, host_id, cat.name AS category, space_name AS name, address, detail_addr AS address2 FROM space s LEFT OUTER JOIN category_space cat ON s.category_no = cat.category_no WHERE space_no = #{spaceId}

SELECT su.unit_no AS unitNo, title, price_per_hour AS pricePerHour, max_capacity AS maxCapacity, description, thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, sp.min_hours AS minHours FROM space_unit su LEFT OUTER JOIN space_policy sp ON su.unit_no = sp.unit_no WHERE space_no = #{spaceId}

SELECT su.unit_no AS unitNo, title, price_per_hour AS pricePerHour, max_capacity AS maxCapacity, description, thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, sp.min_hours AS minHours FROM space_unit su LEFT OUTER JOIN space_policy sp ON su.unit_no = sp.unit_no WHERE su.unit_no = #{unitId}
